heading.title: Add your own timeline
heading.description: Use this block as a template for resume-style highlights or remove it if you do not need it.

timeline.title: Sample Role
highlights: Summarize a key impact or project here.
Mention collaboration or tooling that matters to you.
Keep bullets short so they are easy to scan.

timeline.title: Previous Role
highlights: Swap these examples with your own milestones.
Use as many or as few items as you like.
Delete the entire section if it is not relevant.
